title: nigritella nigra subsp. carpatica
intro: Nigritella nigra subsp. carpatica, also known as the Alpine Ghost or Carpathian Ghost Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid found in the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of gastritis and ulcers, due to its high concentration of iridoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Nigritella nigra subsp. carpatica include its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve insulin sensitivity, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use and availability may be restricted due to its rarity and protected status.
